title: g3-llmproxy — STAND-IN semantics-pin annotation: a cross-family pair of pinned blind LLM annotators (GPT-5.6-Sol + Claude Haiku 4.5) fills the two-human g3.annotate GATE-H role over the SAME 200 pinned instances under the frozen two-pass protocol (pass-A Q1 truth-of-claim, pass-B Q2 all-conditions-satisfied; violations derived per the frozen rule); pre-declared concordant/union bracket verdict, mismatched-conditions probe, zero GPU; the human-annotated g3 remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and solely adjudicating for HS3
hypotheses: H-G3P-NECESSITY (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): under blind two-pass rendering, the proxy judge pair finds a necessity-violation rate consistent with the frozen g3 survives-bar — PASS-analog iff the UNION-rule rate's one-sided 95% Wilson UB <= 0.10; FAIL-analog iff the CONCORDANT-rule rate's Wilson LB > 0.10 (each verdict direction must clear under the pre-declared combination rule LEAST favourable to it); anything between is INCONCLUSIVE. A PASS-analog is a WEAK FEASIBILITY SIGNAL only; a FAIL-analog is the g3-kill early-warning analog at this proxy id
H-G3P-SUFFICIENCY (secondary, same bracket rule): sufficiency-violation rate vs the same 0.10 bar; reported with both bracket bounds; never fires the primary verdict

H-G3P-PAIR (instrument, FAIL-direction gates): cross-family judge-pair kappa on the necessity indicator (frozen kappa < 0.4 rule carried over as judge-pair instability => INSTRUMENT-INVALID) + per-judge escape/coverage gates + the mismatched-conditions probe (correct answer 'no' by construction; false-satisfaction >= 0.30 invalidates); pass directions validate nothing about human agreement

scale_rungs: none (annotation adjudication only; no host model; no GPU)

independent_vars.name: judge_role
levels: judge-pA (GPT-5.6-Sol, cross-vendor half of the pair)
judge-pB (Claude Haiku 4.5 via headless claude -p; vendor-family overlap with the materials' authoring agents DISCLOSED, FORK-2-style; never a sole gold source)

independent_vars.name: item_set
levels: 200 pinned instances, pass-A rendering (text + target claim, protocol instruction verbatim)
200 pinned instances, pass-B rendering (text + bindings + enumerated conditions, concept word/label/target withheld, protocol instruction verbatim)
probe-B mismatched-conditions items (30; instrument control; never in counts)

dependent_vars.name: necessity_rate_concordant
dependent_vars.definition: over dual-decisive instances (q1,q2 in {yes,no} for BOTH judges): share where BOTH judges derive a necessity violation (q1=yes and q2=no, the frozen rule verbatim). The FAIL-analog statistic (lower bracket)

dependent_vars.name: necessity_rate_union
dependent_vars.definition: over dual-decisive instances: share where EITHER judge derives a necessity violation. The PASS-analog statistic (upper bracket)

dependent_vars.name: sufficiency_rate_concordant
dependent_vars.definition: same concordant rule on the frozen sufficiency-violation derivation (q1=no and q2=yes)

dependent_vars.name: sufficiency_rate_union
dependent_vars.definition: same union rule on sufficiency violations

dependent_vars.name: kappa_pair
dependent_vars.definition: Cohen's kappa on the per-instance necessity indicator between the two proxy judges, the analysis/g3.py 2x2 closed form; < 0.4 trips INSTRUMENT-INVALID (judge-pair instability), never FAIL; its pass direction is NOT human-agreement evidence

dependent_vars.name: probe_false_satisfaction_rate
dependent_vars.definition: per judge: share of labelled probe-B items answered q2=yes where 'no' is correct by construction (another concept's condition set); >= 0.30 invalidates that judge's instrument

dependent_vars.name: n_dual_decisive
dependent_vars.definition: instances decisive (q1,q2 both in {yes,no}) for both judges; floor 170 of 200

arms_mandatory_baselines: probe-B mismatched-conditions control (house content-scramble idiom at the condition-set level: seed-pinned concept-level Sattolo derangement of condition sets, original text + bindings verbatim => correct pass-B answer 'no' by construction; measures false-satisfaction propensity = the channel that would fabricate a low violation rate)

cross-family judge pair (the frozen two-annotator design mirrored with GPT-5.6-Sol + Haiku 4.5: kappa gets cross-family diagnostic content; both remain LLMs with shared web-scale exposure — kappa is pair stability, never human-agreement evidence)
kernel-as-text null and host-model arms: NOT APPLICABLE by design — no host model, no GPU cell; this record measures annotator-instrument behaviour over pinned stimuli, not model lift

n_planned.adjudication:
per judge: ALL pass-A items complete before any pass-B item (the frozen contamination rule; structurally guaranteed anyway by stateless per-item calls — one item, one pass, one fresh process, no session state); item orders seed-pinned g3lp/1|judge-

-|20260710; judge-pA via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1 effort low (truthstyle judges-invocation section 4.1 form; server-side output schemas: pass-A enum, pass-B object {q2, q2_failing_conditions}); judge-pB via headless claude -p claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 (section 4.3 form: format-only pinned system prompt, tools disabled, setting sources empty, no session persistence, thinking disabled, subscription auth asserted); first-valid-answer-final, <= 3 content attempts then no-label; preflight: 2 pinned calibration items per pass per judge, first-attempt pass required; blinding grep audit per call (kernel/nsm/necessity/sufficiency/hypothesis) — any hit aborts; the in-session Agent-tool sub-agent form is FORBIDDEN (project-context injection)
n_planned.escape_and_coverage: cannot-say is neither violation nor satisfaction (the protocol's stated treatment); per judge per pass cannot-say <= 5% AND no-label <= 5%, else INSTRUMENT-INVALID (the protocol's ~5% re-examination line made mechanical); dual-decisive floor 170/200
n_planned.decidability: with the analysis/g3.py Wilson closed form (z=1.645) at n=200: PASS-analog (union UB <= 0.10) reachable up to ~13 union violations; FAIL-analog (concordant LB > 0.10) from ~27 concordant violations; both branches stay reachable at the 170 floor (~11 and ~24)
n_planned.stage_discipline: freeze BEFORE any judge call; stage invocation specs + prompt templates + output schemas + probe manifest + calibration items -> ops amendment pins them -> preflight -> pass-A x2 judges -> pass-B x2 judges -> probes x2 judges -> assemble data/g3-annot-llmproxy -> corpus-pin ops amendment -> log-append the single final-phase record -> verdict-gen -> cross-vendor audit (family overlaps DISCLOSED; the audit is mechanical recomputation from pinned bytes) -> Fable interpretive assessment

assumptions.claim: stand-in rationale: the frozen g3 record requires g3.annotate to be TWO independent blinded HUMAN annotators (GATE-H, ~8-10h); they are unsourced at run time (open decision O-3) and the maintainer requested blind-LLM stand-ins (2026-07-10) so experiments run now and are human-verified later; fresh id on the f2b-transfer-llmproxy model, never a correction of g3; registered as ASM-0550 and ASM-0530

judge pair: cross-family (GPT-5.6-Sol + Haiku 4.5) mirrors the frozen two-annotator design and gives kappa cross-family content; judge-pB's vendor-family overlap with the materials' authors is disclosed and is why it is half of a pair, never sole gold; registered as ASM-0530 and ASM-0551

bracket verdict rule: the human record deliberately left the two-annotator combination rule open; the proxy PRE-DECLARES a two-sided bracket (PASS-analog under union, FAIL-analog under concordant) so each verdict direction is conservative and the human round's open decision is left unconsumed; registered as ASM-0531

ordinary-usage estimand gap: HS3 is a claim about human ordinary usage; LLM judgments approximate it with unproven systematic offsets (the pass-B literalism channel may push the violation rate either way); registered as ASM-0532, load_bearing false, resolved by the human g3 on identical instances

escape/coverage gates instantiate the protocol's ~5% cannot-say proposal mechanically (per judge per pass) with a 170/200 dual-decisive floor keeping both Wilson branches reachable; registered as ASM-0533

probe-B construction: concept-level Sattolo derangement of condition sets with original bindings verbatim gives correct-answer-'no' items by construction; roles may be unbound in the deranged set — cannot-say on probes counts as non-endorsement, only q2=yes counts as false satisfaction; registered as ASM-0534

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; the 20 concepts here are non-knownWeak kernel-v0 concepts, a favourable slice, and no coverage-general semantics claim exists here

nothing here amends g3: its frozen record, GATE-H human annotation path, open run-stage decisions and instance-descriptions placeholder pin stand exactly as frozen; this record writes nothing under data/instance-descriptions/, neither fills g3's pins nor appends to its log; proxy outputs are quarantined from any future human annotator (ASM-0553)

endpoints.test: the frozen g3 two-decision Wilson rule (z=1.645, analysis/g3.py closed form) applied to the pre-declared bracket: PASS-analog iff the UNION necessity-violation rate's Wilson 95% UB <= 0.10; FAIL-analog iff the CONCORDANT rate's Wilson 95% LB > 0.10 (verdict rule consumes /analysis/proxy_fail); anything between is INCONCLUSIVE and buys nothing (the human round, not more proxy calls, is the next spend) — and the extrapolation envelope caps ANY PASS at 'weak feasibility proxy'
same bracket rule on the sufficiency (equivalence) reading: /analysis/sufficiency_equivalence_survives_proxy iff union UB <= 0.10; reported with concordant bounds; never verdict-bearing

INSTRUMENT gate in its FAIL direction (frozen g3 rule carried over): kappa < 0.4 => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (judge-pair instability); its pass direction is a cross-family stability diagnostic, never human-agreement evidence
INSTRUMENT gate, point rule per judge: probe-B false-satisfaction rate >= 0.30 OR probe coverage < 27/30 => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (the channel that would fabricate a low violation rate)

REPORTED-ONLY: per-judge necessity/sufficiency rates, escape rates, no-label counts, and the pass-B failing-cid histogram (the beginnings of the failure taxonomy the human round will need); carries no verdict weight

kill_criterion_verbatim: g3-llmproxy kill (PROXY-ONLY, zero GPU, the two-human g3.annotate role filled by the pinned cross-family LLM pair): FAIL-analog fires iff the CONCORDANT necessity-violation rate's one-sided 95% Wilson LB > 0.10 over dual-decisive instances (violations derived per the frozen rule verbatim: necessity violation iff q1=yes and q2=no; concordant = both judges). This mirrors the frozen g3 kill ('necessity failures >10% => defeasible-script stands, HS2 auto-resolves sidecar-only') in FORM ONLY; it can neither fire nor discharge g3's own kill — HS2 auto-resolution, g5 pruning and Pi demotion can be triggered ONLY by the human-annotated g3. A proxy FAIL-analog warrants pausing Pi-hardening investment and escalating to the maintainer, formally scoped to this proxy id. Degeneracy discipline (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS): preflight failure; per-judge per-pass cannot-say > 5% or no-label > 5%; n_dual_decisive < 170 of 200; kappa_pair < 0.4; probe-B false-satisfaction >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 27/30 for either judge.
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE ADJUDICATING STUDY: the two-independent-human g3.annotate role (GATE-H, ~8-10h, blind to hypotheses) is filled by a pinned cross-family LLM pair (judge-pA GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1 effort low; judge-pB Claude Haiku 4.5 via headless claude -p under the truthstyle-2x2 section-4.3 hardening) because the human annotators are unsourced at run time (open decision O-3); g3 (frozen_sha256 ef9608c60fc0355074b2d50132bbc79cbe49c5e9b578c724d81d31ce95bef7aa) remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and is the ONLY experiment on this line whose readout adjudicates HS3 or triggers the HS2 sidecar auto-resolution and g5 pruning. The violation rates here ARE two LLMs' blind judgments of ordinary usage and literal condition satisfaction — NOT native-speaker human competence, which is the HS3 estimand. Binding weakenings: (1) ESTIMAND GAP — LLM ordinary-usage and literal-reading judgments approximate human judgments with unproven systematic offsets (ASM-0532); the pass-B literalism channel can push the necessity rate UP (hyper-literal condition failures) or DOWN (charitable reading), direction unproven, so NEITHER verdict direction is a measurement of the human rates. (2) PAIR, NOT PANEL — the cross-family pair is stronger than a single-family pair (kappa carries cross-family diagnostic content) but both judges are web-scale-trained LLMs with shared exposure to ordinary-language usage data; kappa is judge-pair stability, never inter-HUMAN-annotator agreement evidence; judge-pB's vendor family overlaps the materials' authoring agents (disclosed). (3) BRACKET RULE, NOT THE HUMAN COMBINATION RULE — the human record's combination rule is deliberately open; this record's pre-declared concordant/union bracket (ASM-0531) makes each verdict direction conservative under ITS least favourable rule, and the eventual human round is free to fix its own rule — the proxy consumes no open decision. (4) TRADITION FAMILIARITY — both judge families plausibly contain NSM-adjacent literature (ASM-0552); the mismatched-conditions probe bounds only crude non-literal endorsement. (5) LICENSE OF A PASS — a PASS-analog means exactly: 'a blind cross-family LLM pair, under the frozen two-pass rendering with working escapes, finds union-rule necessity violations at <= the 0.10 Wilson bar on the 200 pinned instances'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550). It does NOT adjudicate HS3, does NOT resolve HS2, does NOT un-prune or prune g5, does NOT demote or confirm Pi as more than lint, does NOT substitute for the GATE-H human annotation, and does NOT extend to human annotators, other concepts, other instance distributions, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (6) ASYMMETRIC READING — the disclosed channels have UNPROVEN direction here (unlike the endorsement-style records), so the bracket rule carries the conservatism instead: a FAIL-analog (concordant LB > 0.10 despite the lower bracket) is a strong early warning — pause Pi-hardening investment and escalate — while a PASS-analog licenses only continued investment (human annotator sourcing, Pi-line engineering) and never upgrades any claim. (7) Instance bytes, condition renderings, pass instructions and the derived-violation rules are byte-identical to the pinned human materials; per-item proxy labels are pinned so the eventual human round yields a free human-vs-proxy bias measurement (ASM-0553); nothing else carries over.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py
corpus_hashes.g3-annot-llmproxy: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:both judges' pass-A/pass-B/probe responses + labels-proxy + summary, pinned by ops amendment after the judge runs and before the final-phase record

artifact_hashes._pin_note: instance-descriptions digest is the CANDIDATE-MATERIALS state at design time (the frozen g3 carries its own PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder for the same corpus); re-verified at this record's freeze; if g3's own materials pin lands on different bytes first, this record re-pins BEFORE freeze — never after
artifact_hashes.poc/g3-llmproxy/judge-invocation.md: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:staged with prompt templates + output schemas + probe manifest + calibration items, pinned by ops amendment BEFORE any judge call
artifact_hashes.poc/g3-llmproxy/build-probe-b.py: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:seed-pinned concept-level Sattolo probe builder, staged + pinned with the invocation spec

model_revisions._note: no host models: zero GPU cells in this record
model_revisions.judge-pA: gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low (truthstyle-2x2 section-4.1 form; re-verify version banner at preflight)
model_revisions.judge-pB: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 via headless claude -p sub-process (truthstyle-2x2 section-4.3 form: format-only system prompt, tools disabled, no setting sources, no session persistence, thinking disabled, subscription auth asserted per call; the in-session Agent-tool sub-agent form is FORBIDDEN)

runner_constraints.infra: sequential per-item calls; the two judges' passes may run concurrently with each other (2 processes); items within a pass never parallelised
runner_constraints.harness: poc/g3-llmproxy/judge-invocation.md (mechanical; staged + pinned pre-run; any undecided situation is a BOUNDARY STOP back to the designer, never runner improvisation)
runner_constraints.authorization: maintainer-requested stand-in (2026-07-10): blind-LLM proxies for the outstanding human annotation passes, human-verified later, per the f2b-transfer-llmproxy precedent (ASM-0550); usd_cap 15 sits inside every auto-authorization envelope; budget.maintainer_signoff reserved for Tier-5 records and deliberately absent
